pizzerias.t: (pizzeria 的复数) n. 匹萨饼店, 意大利肉饼店
pizzerias.d:
plural of pizzeria
n. a shop where pizzas are made and sold

pizzicato.t:
n. 拨奏曲, 用指弹的乐曲
a. 指弹的
pizzicato.d:
n. a note or passage that is played pizzicato
s. (of instruments in the violin family) to be plucked with the finger
r. with a light plucking staccato sound

pizzle.t: 动物的阴茎(过去曾做鞭子用)
pizzle.d: n. The penis; -- so called in some animals, as the bull.
